description: Formal business/project report: exec summary, background, findings, analysis, deliverables table, recommendations.

fields.name: report_subtitle
fields.example: Performance, drivers, and the decisions required for Q4.

fields.name: executive_summary
fields.example: The quarter closed 4% above plan on the strength of two enterprise renewals. Margin improved 1.2 points; the one deteriorating indicator is customer NPS, for which a funded recovery plan is underway.
fields.guidance: 3-5 sentences: findings first, then implication, then the ask.

fields.name: background
fields.example: This review covers the third quarter of 2026 and follows the methodology agreed in the January planning cycle.
fields.guidance: 1-2 short paragraphs of context: scope, period, method.

fields.name: findings
fields.example: Cost per tonne fell 14% in the phased scenario

fields.name: analysis_detail
fields.example: The cost improvement is driven primarily by cycle-time consistency rather than fleet size: variance between shifts fell 40% after dispatch rule changes.
fields.guidance: The analytical detail behind the findings; several sentences.

fields.name: recommendations
fields.example: Commit to the phased transition starting north pit Q2 2027

fields.name: next_steps
fields.example: Board decision on phase 1 capex — Sipho Dlamini — by 31 January
fields.guidance: Action bullets with owners and dates.

fields.name: deliverable_description
fields.example: Validated model of current haulage operations
